title: Workers Logs
excerpt: description: Store, filter, and analyze log data emitted from Cloudflare Workers. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Workers Logs lets you automatically collect, store, filter, and analyze logging data emitted from Cloudflare Workers. Data is written to your Cloudflare Account, and you can query it in the dashboard for each of your Workers. All newly created Workers will come with the observability setting enabled by default.…
